name: Staude Capital Global Value Fund Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3382. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$1.3382, stop A$1.2771, target A$1.4070. Risk/reward is 1.12:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
